data.body:
SESSION-RESUMPTION BRAINSTORM — handoff (dogfooding the contract we are designing)

- Known-good commit / rollback: 85de05955ef (branch main) — clean; this session only wrote ticket events, no code touched.
- Baseline verification command: n/a (brainstorm; no code changed).
- Baseline result: n/a.
- Current change objective: design a mandatory, compact session-resumption handoff contract for rebar (interrupted/reassigned work).
- Files/contracts changed: none (design only). Full design lives in idea cdc0-fd18-3c8e-4345 (aurous-chewable-blackrhino).
- Open + closed items:
    - LOCKED: freshness stamp added; rollback point merged into known-good commit; environment fingerprint dropped; decisions/dead-ends folded into field #6 (open+closed, +pointer to comment trail) [my recommendation — not yet vetoed].
    - Reproducibility trio (#1 commit, #2 command, #3 result) = the design's differentiator, per prior art.
- Currently failing checks: none.
- Next bounded action: resume Decision 2 (freshness — continuous-at-checkpoints vs write-at-interruption), then Decisions 3–6 (who fills it / resumer duty / what "diagnosis" is / how mandatory + code-gate-vs-convention).
- Stop / escalation condition: if the user wants to revisit any LOCKED decision, settle that before proceeding to implementation.
- Freshness stamp: commit 85de05955ef, branch main, 2026-07-18.
- Full research, discussion, and decision log: idea cdc0-fd18-3c8e-4345.
